# Olympia Futarchy — Prediction Markets for Ethereum Classic

## About

Olympia Futarchy is a prediction market governance application for Ethereum Classic (ETC). It implements futarchy — a governance model where proposals are resolved by market outcomes instead of direct voting. Participants trade on conditional prediction markets, and the market price determines the governance decision.

## Key Features

- Prediction market creation and trading
- Futarchy governance proposals (ECIP-1117)
- Oracle integration and resolution
- On-chain position settlement
- Conditional market pairs (pass/fail outcomes)

## Technology

- Next.js 16 (App Router)
- React 19, TypeScript 5
- wagmi 2 + viem (Ethereum Classic interaction)
- Tailwind CSS 4

## Network

- Mordor Testnet (Chain ID 63)
- Demo v0.1
- Contracts pending deployment from olympia-contracts-futarchy

## Links

- DAO: https://olympiadao.org
- Treasury: https://olympiatreasury.org
- Futarchy: https://futarchy.olympiadao.org
- GitHub: https://github.com/olympiadao
